questions.question: Describe the key differences between Minimax and Alpha-Beta pruning algorithms used in game playing AI. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Focus on the main advantages and limitations of each algorithm

questions.question: What is the primary function of a Hidden Markov Model (HMM) in Natural Language Processing, and how does it contribute to the processing of speech and text data? (10 marks)
questions.hint: Provide a detailed explanation of the HMM's components and applications

questions.question: Explain the concept of lexical semantics in the context of Natural Language Processing, highlighting its significance and how it is used in text analysis and information retrieval. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Discuss the relationship between lexical semantics and other NLP concepts, such as syntax and pragmatics
